title: Actions with Sub Items
excerpt:
For Sub Items, 

Is there any Query API to get the list of Sub Items for a given Item ID?
Can a Sub-Items be converted to Item ? [i.e. Remove its Parent] ?
Can the Parent of Sub-Item be Changed ?

posts.author: TechOpsHub (Tech OpsHub)
posts.cookedHtml:
For Sub Items,

  1. Is there any Query API to get the list of Sub Items for a given Item ID?
  2. Can a Sub-Items be converted to Item ? [i.e. Remove its Parent] ?
  3. Can the Parent of Sub-Item be Changed ?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
